description: Redesign Home, Category, and Product Detail screens with premium UI, animations, data fetching, and shimmer loading
steps: Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/products/presentation/home_screen.dart: animated banner carousel with auto-play and dot indicators (PageView with Timer), category horizontal scroll with circular image chips and subtle shadow, search bar at top (non-functional placeholder that navigates to search), featured products grid with product images (network image with placeholder), shimmer loading state for all sections, pull-to-refresh, staggered animation for product grid items appearing, section headers with 'See All' buttons

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/products/presentation/category_screen.dart: grid of products filtered by category, app bar with category name, sort/filter chips, shimmer loading, pull-to-refresh, animated product cards with add-to-cart button overlay, empty state

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/products/presentation/product_detail_screen.dart: full-width hero image at top (with Hero widget for transition from grid), floating back button, price section with discount badge and percentage off, animated 'Add to Cart' button that morphs (shows quantity controls when item in cart), product description expandable section, related products horizontal scroll at bottom, GST info display, stock indicator with color coding

Create mobile/lib/features/products/presentation/widgets/product_card.dart - shared animated product card widget used in home grid, category grid, and related products. Features: network image with shimmer placeholder, price with discount, quick add button with scale animation, Hero wrapping for detail transition

Create mobile/lib/features/products/providers/products_provider.dart - Riverpod providers for: featured products, categories, banners, product by ID, products by category. Use the existing ProductRepository. Include loading/error/data states using AsyncValue.
acceptance_criteria: Home screen has auto-playing banner carousel with dot indicators
Home screen shows category chips with images in horizontal scroll
Home screen has product grid with network images and shimmer loading
Category screen filters products and shows sort chips
Product detail has full-width hero image with Hero animation
Product detail has animated add-to-cart that shows quantity when in cart
Shared ProductCard widget exists with Hero and animations
Riverpod providers exist for products, categories, banners
All screens show shimmer during loading and error states with retry
verification: Verify home_screen.dart has PageView carousel with timer auto-play
Verify products_provider.dart exists with AsyncValue providers
Verify shimmer loading states in home_screen.dart
